gnomad.note: extremely rare but present across European cohorts; not absent

insilico.note: approximate; predictors lean damaging but not unanimous

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 BRCT-domain saturation genome editing; partial loss-of-function, between WT-like and null

literature.title: Analysis of BRCA1 variants in double-strand break repair by homologous recombination.
literature.abstract: p.Arg1699Gln shows reduced but not abolished homology-directed repair activity in cell-based assays, consistent with a moderate-risk allele.

literature.title: ENIGMA classification of BRCA1 c.5096G>A (p.Arg1699Gln) as a moderate-risk allele.
literature.abstract: Multifactorial likelihood analysis of segregation, tumor pathology, and functional data places p.Arg1699Gln as an intermediate-risk variant with breast and ovarian cancer odds ratios below classical BRCA1 founder alleles.

_ground_truth.note: ENIGMA expert panel treats p.Arg1699Gln as a moderate-risk allele; ClinVar consensus is VUS with conflicting submissions
